proposal1.heroHeadline: StudioVB is losing $20,000 a year on manual proposals. This is how it happens.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently taking hours for proposals. Now, generate in 47 seconds with AI.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Let's explore where the losses bleed from StudioVB's current proposal process.

problems.title: Time Sinkhole
problems.description: Every 10 hours spent writing proposals is 10 hours not designing beautiful spaces. That's $5,000 a year in lost design revenue.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Every delayed proposal is a potential client lost. StudioVB misses 2 clients monthly, costing $10,000 in potential earnings.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent proposals weaken your brand. This costs $3,000 a year in diminished client trust and retention.

problems.title: Hidden Errors
problems.description: Manual entries lead to costly errors. StudioVB loses $1,000 annually fixing mistakes instead of creating livable spaces.

problems.title: Overhead Drain
problems.description: Proposal tasks eat into operational hours. Annually, StudioVB spends $800 on unnecessary admin work.

problems.title: Stress and Burnout
problems.description: Valerie spends 5 extra hours a week on proposals. This leads to burnout, impacting creativity and costing $200 monthly in stress management.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Here's how our AI system transforms StudioVB's proposal process.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to craft. Our system delivers them in seconds, freeing up valuable time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual entries risk inconsistency. Our AI ensures every proposal is on-brand and polished.

solutions.title: Error-Free Outputs
solutions.description: Manual errors can be costly. Our system minimizes mistakes, saving time and money.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Engagement
solutions.description: Delayed responses lose clients. Our AI speeds up interaction, securing more deals.

solutions.title: Reduced Stress
solutions.description: Proposal stress affects creativity. Our system reduces workload, boosting creativity and well-being.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for StudioVB's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for StudioVB around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for StudioVB.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Future with StudioVB's Cutting-Edge Design Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We're excited to partner with Acme Corp for a tailored design strategy that turns visitors into engaged customers.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Right now, Acme Corp is experiencing significant revenue losses due to missed opportunities.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves without converting is revenue walking out the door. This means potential sales slipping away daily.

problems.title: Outdated Branding
problems.description: An outdated brand image can lead to a 30% loss in potential customer engagement. Your competitors are capturing your market share.

problems.title: Poor User Experience
problems.description: A confusing user interface results in a 40% higher bounce rate. Users leave before they even learn about your offerings.

problems.title: Ineffective Marketing Strategies
problems.description: Without targeted marketing, you're missing out on reaching the right audience, leading to a potential 25% drop in sales.

problems.title: Lack of Social Media Presence
problems.description: By not engaging on social media, Acme Corp is losing direct interaction with 50% of its potential customer base.

problems.title: Weak Online Visibility
problems.description: Low search engine rankings mean you're invisible to new customers, resulting in a 35% loss of potential online traffic.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions are designed to address these specific challenges and turn losses into gains.

solutions.title: Brand Refresh
solutions.description: We'll revamp your brand to reconnect with your audience and boost engagement by 30%.

solutions.title: Website Redesign
solutions.description: Enhance your user experience to reduce bounce rates by 40% and increase conversions.

solutions.title: Marketing Strategy
solutions.description: A customized marketing plan will target your ideal customers, increasing sales by up to 25%.

solutions.title: Social Media Management
solutions.description: Improve your social media presence to engage 50% more of your potential audience.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: StudioVB is your partner in creating memorable design experiences.

whyUsCards.title: Creative Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our team excels in innovative design solutions that set you apart.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Approach

whyUsCards.title: Proven Success
whyUsCards.description: With a track record of boosting client engagement, we deliver results.

whyUsCards.title: Comprehensive Services
whyUsCards.description: From branding to website design, we offer a full suite of design services.

team.name: Valerie Betz
